content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/components/Concerns/components/ConcernsTable.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 4 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 37
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   36          <HelperText>
   37            <HelperTextItem variant="indeterminate">
   38              {t('No concerns found for this virtual machine.')}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 63
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-label]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Label> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Label> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Label variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Label>
  After:  <Label variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Label> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Label><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Label>
  After:  <Label icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Label>

Incident context:
  componentName: Label
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-table
  parentName: Td

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Label
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   62                  <Td>
   63                    <Label
   64                      color={getCategoryColor(concern.category)}

```

### Fix 3
Lines: 52, 53, 54
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-th-additionalcontent]:
Component <Th> has a new prop `additionalContent` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <Th> and determine if any should be moved to the `additionalContent` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <Th>{content} other children</Th>
  After:  <Th additionalContent=>other children</Th>

Incident context:
  componentName: Th
  module: @patternfly/react-table
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-table
  parentName: Tr

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Th
Prop: additionalContent
To: React.ReactNode

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 52):
   51            <Tr>
   52              <Th width={10}>{t('Label')}</Th>
   53              <Th width={10}>{t('Category')}</Th>

  (line 53):
   52              <Th width={10}>{t('Label')}</Th>
   53              <Th width={10}>{t('Category')}</Th>
   54              <Th width={30}>{t('Assessment')}</Th>

  (line 54):
   53              <Th width={10}>{t('Category')}</Th>
   54              <Th width={30}>{t('Assessment')}</Th>
   55            </Tr>

```

### Fix 4
Lines: 35, 48
Rule [sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light]:
The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Choose the appropriate replacement from the valid values: "default", "secondary"

Review the component documentation to determine which value best matches the behavior of "light".

Incident context:
  componentName: PageSection
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: light

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropValueChange
Component: PageSection
Prop: variant
From: light

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 35):
   34      return (
   35        <PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light}>
   36          <HelperText>

  (line 48):
   47    return (
   48      <PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light} className="concerns-table">
   49        <Table aria-label="Expandable table" variant="compact">

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/components/Concerns/components/ConcernsTable.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
Let me start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 (Line 37): `HelperTextItem` icon children → `icon` prop
Looking at lines 37-39:
```tsx
<HelperTextItem variant="indeterminate">
  {t('No concerns found for this virtual machine.')}
</HelperTextItem>
```
This `HelperTextItem` contains only text, no icon. The rule says to move icon content to the `icon` prop, but there's no icon here. The `variant="indeterminate"` is what triggers the rule — in PF v6, `HelperTextItem` with certain variants may show a built-in icon. No icon children to move. No change needed for icon migration. However, looking more carefully, the `variant="indeterminate"` itself doesn't need changing per this rule — the rule is about moving icon children to the `icon` prop. Since there are no icon children, this is already fine.

### Fix 2 (Line 63): `Label` icon children → `icon` prop
Lines 63-68:
```tsx
<Label
  color={getCategoryColor(concern.category)}
  icon={getCategoryIcon(concern.category)}
>
  {getCategoryTitle(concern.category)}
</Label>
```
The `icon` prop is already being used! The icon is passed via `icon={getCategoryIcon(concern.category)}` and the children are text only. This fix is already applied.

### Fix 3 (Lines 52-54): `Th` new `additionalContent` prop
Lines 52-54:
```tsx
<Th width={10}>{t('Label')}</Th>
<Th width={10}>{t('Category')}</Th>
<Th width={30}>{t('Assessment')}</Th>
```
Each `<Th>` has a single text child — simple header labels. The `additionalContent` prop is for content that was previously mixed alongside the main header text. These are simple single-content headers with no additional content to extract. No change needed.

### Fix 4 (Lines 35, 48): `PageSectionVariants.light` → `"default"`
Line 35: `<PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light}>`
Line 48: `<PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light} className="concerns-table">`

The `"light"` variant is no longer valid. The replacement should be `"default"` which is the closest match to the old `light` variant (light background). I'll change `PageSectionVariants.light` to `"default"` and then clean up the now-unused `PageSectionVariants` import.
Let me verify the final state of the file:

The file looks correct. All changes are applied properly.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem` | **No change needed** | The `<HelperTextItem>` at line 37 contains only text (`{t('No concerns found...')}`), no icon children. Nothing to move to the `icon` prop. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-label` | **No change needed** | The `<Label>` at line 63 already uses the `icon` prop (`icon={getCategoryIcon(concern.category)}`). Children contain only text (`{getCategoryTitle(concern.category)}`). Already in the correct v6 pattern. |
| Fix 3 | `sd-new-absorbing-prop-th-additionalcontent` | **No change needed** | All three `<Th>` elements (lines 51–53) contain only a single text child (simple header labels). There is no additional content to extract into the `additionalContent` prop. |
| Fix 4 | `sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light` | **Applied** | Changed `PageSectionVariants.light` → `"default"` at both locations (lines 34 and 47). Removed the now-unused `PageSectionVariants` import from `@patternfly/react-core`. |
